corrections.text: The article attributes the webcam specification — "The webcam is a 10-megapixel sensor" — to Engadget. That figure does not appear in the Engadget report; the "10 MP webcam with an IR sensor" detail comes from Notebookcheck, which is also cited in the article. The 10-megapixel resolution is accurate; only the inline citation pointed to the wrong outlet.
